(SEE MINI-MINUTES AND ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE HAROLD KAHN; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489 (302/HK)

THE MOVING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF ITS FILINGS WITH DEPT. 302 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-05-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS ALPESHBHAI PATEL AND HARIOMBAPU, LLC MOTION FOR FEES AND COSTS AND TO AMEND THE JUDGMENT. ARGUMENT PRESENTED BY COUNSEL. DEFENSE WITNESS NEVILLE PARUKANWALA IS ADMINISTERED WITNESS OATH, AND TESTIFIES UNDER DIRECT EXAMINATION BY DEFENSE COUNSEL, EXAMINATION BY THE COURT, AND CROSS-EXAMINATION BY PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL. MATTER SUBMITTED. THE COURT MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND ORDERS AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. FEES OF $7,500.00 ARE AWARDED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF ALPHESHBHAI PATEL AND AGAINST DEFENDANT AVIGNON JULIAN LLC. THE COURT FINDS THERE WAS NO MEETING OF MINDS AS TO THE SETTLEMENT. MS. TSE HAD REASONABLE GROUNDS TO BELIEVE THERE WAS A FULL SETTLEMENT, BUT MR. PARUJANWALA TESTIFIES THAT HE COMMUNICATED THAT HE DID NOT BELIEVE THIS TO BE SO OR THAT HE DID NOT HAVE THE AUTHORIZATION TO DO SO. AS A MATTER OF EQUITY, THE COURT SHALL AWARD $7,500.00 IN ATTORNEY'S FEES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489

Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Oct-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Attys. MICHAEL HEATH, ESQ. and HOWARD OLSEN, ESQ. of the Law Office of Michael Heath, Tel No. 415-931-4207 appearing for Plaintiffs;
Atty. JAMES C. ASHWORTH of the Ashworth Law Office, Tel No. 530-574-1130 specially appearing for Defendant Avignon Julian LLC;
ALICE TSE present as representative agent of Avignon Julian LLC;
NEVILLE PARUJANWALA present.

RULING - Argument presented by counsel. Defense witness NEVILLE PARUKANWALA is administered witness oath, and testifies under direct examination by defense counsel, examination by the Court, and cross-examination by Plaintiffs' counsel. Matter submitted. The Court modifies its tentative ruling and orders as follows: PLAINTIFFS ALPESHBHAI PATEL AND HARIOMBAPU, LLC motion for fees and costs and to amend the judgment is granted in part and denied in part. Fees of $7,500.00 are awarded in favor of plaintiff Alpheshbhai Patel and against defendant Avignon Julian LLC. The Court finds there was no meeting of minds as to the settlement. Ms. Tse had reasonable grounds to believe there was a full settlement, but Mr. Parujanwala testifies that he communicated that he did not believe this to be so or that he did not have the authorization to do so. As a matter of equity, the Court shall award $7,500.00 in attorney's fees. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES

Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/eg

Notice Of Hearing Re Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael Heath, of Law Offices of Michael Heath, Tel. 415.931.4207, for plaintiffs;
Steve Whitworth, Attorney at Law, Tel. 916.668.5970, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONERS ALPESHBHAI PATEL, AND HARIOMBAPU, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. Defendant has not shown any grounds why the arbitaron award should not be confirmed. Defendant's counsel's own inactions, far more than anything else, contributed to the arbitration hearings occurring on dates and times that may not have been convenient for defendant or its counsel. Order and judgment signed in open court. Judge Harold Kahn; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/HK)
